title: Executive strategy deck from a source brief
prompt: Create an 8-slide executive strategy deck for Atlas AI Workspace based on the provided source brief. Focus on growth priorities, adoption bottlenecks, renewal risk, and the strategic actions leadership should take next quarter.
acceptanceNotes: The deck should frame a coherent business story, not just restate the source bullets.
It should separate current performance from next-quarter actions.
It should not become a product demo deck or investor pitch by accident.
